prestazioni: APR Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash for the **CDL** 2.0L TSI EA113 engine with upgraded **Garrett GT2867 .64 A/R turbocharger**, supporting 380 HP and 450 Nm on 98 RON fuel with **APR High-Pressure Fuel Pump (HPFP)** and **Siemens 630cc injectors**

Full **Forge Motorsport** intercooler kit with **50mm core thickness** and **aluminum end tanks** to eliminate heat soak, paired with a **VWR 3.5" silicone intake system** and **034 Motorsport catch can** for crankcase ventilation

**Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers** with **H&R 24mm front / 22mm rear sway bars** and **034 Motorsport subframe collars**, complemented by **Whiteline adjustable rear toe arms** for precise handling on **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (235/35/19)**
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit** with **custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap** and **OEM+ Golf R rear diffuser delete** for aggressive stance, paired with **Hella Pagid 8400 6-piston front / 4-piston rear brake calipers** with **356mm slotted rotors**

**OEM VW Golf R MK7 front bumper conversion** with **DEPO LED angel eyes** and **custom carbon fiber hood** (replica of **Seibon CF hood**), featuring **functional NACA ducts** for intercooler airflow

**RS Tuning rear wing** (carbon fiber, 3-piece) with **adjustable angle mounts** and **custom LED taillight tint (Luxx Leds V2)**, paired with **OEM VW R-Line side skirts** and **blacked-out VW emblem overlays**
